claims.falsification: schemas/theorem-remote-blob-statement-replay-pass-0039.json is missing, has a different schema, status, theorem_count, remote_check_count, unique_remote_file_count, SHA-256, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0039 created a TheoremRemoteBlobStatementReplaySet/v1 artifact with status REMOTE_BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH, theorem_count 10, remote_check_count 10, unique_remote_file_count 10, sha256 0e13f8c76728c20d3cfdb298638da8c5054f9b2bdf4e6fd8db0f74065fb20376, and seal c01eb59d75eb418f551e302b19dbaf47c4193373f72c4af5d229567fa96ebc58.

claims.falsification: the remote blob statement replay fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0039 records fixture fixtures/theorem-remote-blob-statement-replay-pass-0039.json with sha256 0c584a64729156670ed5e3d74d25d483ef7f664fa8a983994358bb6d17a645a9 and seal d105da2ac0b6422f12f77e924bdf2b88b70517a0355a61f8b601dd11add1c495.

claims.falsification: the pass 0038 or pass 0036 binding is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or does not report the expected source status
claims.text: Pass 0039 binds to pass 0038 Git-blob statement replay and pass 0036 source-ref integrity with the recorded SHA-256 and seals, and source statuses BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH and SOURCE_REF_INTEGRITY_MATCH.

claims.falsification: any of the ten remote statement checks has remote_frozen_solution_status, remote_frozen_proof_status, remote_discharge_status, or remote_signature_status other than MATCH
claims.text: Pass 0039 records all ten theorem remote statement checks with remote frozen-solution, frozen-proof, discharge-gate, and overall signature statuses MATCH.

claims.falsification: any unique remote file has a missing raw URL, a remote raw SHA-256 differing from pass 0038, or a remote raw SHA-256 differing from pass 0036 source-ref integrity
claims.text: Pass 0039 records all ten unique remote files with public GitHub raw URLs, remote raw SHA-256 matching pass 0038 blob bytes, and remote raw SHA-256 matching pass 0036 source-ref integrity.

claims.falsification: the pass 0039 validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, or has different theorem_count, remote_check_count, or unique_remote_file_count
claims.text: Pass 0039 validator result reports MATCH with theorem_count 10, remote_check_count 10, and unique_remote_file_count 10 after a fresh remote fetch.

claims.falsification: packet 049 or the pass 0039 steelman is missing or has a different SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0039 records packet 049 with sha256 4a6ec0126557fa2de5ba878669371a61993689cf7661f0ae0339669c08b3fcc8 and local steelman with sha256 4ddceacc0a3b763ecbbe9871c8790070a7cfb9e63fe268afb083375e543e68f6.

claims.falsification: pass 0039 artifacts claim Lean replay, semantic proof review, axiom-free proof, validation of every public pipeline-math claim, or a promoted natural law
claims.text: Pass 0039 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it checks public raw-source replay by commit only, does not re-run Lean, does not claim semantic proof review, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0039 Remote Raw Blob Statement Replay
